layoutSlots.title: Source of truth
layoutSlots.body: Postgres on the edge, logical replication into the warehouse. One write path, every reader downstream.

layoutSlots.title: dbt + cron
layoutSlots.body: Boring on purpose. Versioned models, tested incrementally, deployed on the same Friday cadence as product code.

layoutSlots.title: Read replicas
layoutSlots.body: Per-region read replicas behind the edge router. P95 stays under 10ms because every query is near the user.

layoutSlots.title: core.events
Cost ceilings
layoutSlots.body: Every workload has a published budget. We page on the burn rate, not the absolute number — surprises stay small.

layoutSlots.title: One platform, many products
layoutSlots.body: Six products share this stack. New product = new schema, not a new platform — that's how a small team runs a large surface.

notes: Showcases LayoutSlide with all three slot kinds: card (with all 4 variants), codeblock (SQL syntax), and plain. Navy-blue's success/danger borders read as muted teal/orange against the navy surface.
